Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgement Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgement Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED, No opposition filed. Defendant to pay sanctions in the amount of $640.00 to Creditors Trade Association, Inc. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Not Reported (302/CWW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgement Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
ASSIGNEE FOR PLAINTIFF, CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., dba GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - continued to 11/24/10. Motion was miscalendared on 11/4/10. Notice of motion indicates 11/24/10 hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
